'''dozhakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuberiform|tuberiform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuberiform|tuberiform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dozhakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozhakithi|dozhakithi]] || [[word:dozhakiji|dozhakiji]] || [[word:dozhakishi|dozhakishi]] || [[word:dozhakiki|dozhakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozhakuthuthu|dozhakuthuthu]] || [[word:dozhakujuju|dozhakujuju]] || [[word:dozhakushushu|dozhakushushu]] || [[word:dozhakukuku|dozhakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozhakuthu|dozhakuthu]] || [[word:dozhakuju|dozhakuju]] || [[word:dozhakushu|dozhakushu]] || [[word:dozhakuku|dozhakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozhakufthuf|dozhakufthuf]] || [[word:dozhakufjuf|dozhakufjuf]] || [[word:dozhakufshuf|dozhakufshuf]] || [[word:dozhakufkuf|dozhakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozhakethe|dozhakethe]] || [[word:dozhakeje|dozhakeje]] || [[word:dozhakeshe|dozhakeshe]] || [[word:dozhakeke|dozhakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozhakothotho|dozhakothotho]] || [[word:dozhakojojo|dozhakojojo]] || [[word:dozhakoshosho|dozhakoshosho]] || [[word:dozhakokoko|dozhakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozhakotho|dozhakotho]] || [[word:dozhakojo|dozhakojo]] || [[word:dozhakosho|dozhakosho]] || [[word:dozhakoko|dozhakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozhakofthof|dozhakofthof]] || [[word:dozhakofjof|dozhakofjof]] || [[word:dozhakofshof|dozhakofshof]] || [[word:dozhakofkof|dozhakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozhakïfthïf|dozhakïfthïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfjïf|dozhakïfjïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfshïf|dozhakïfshïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfkïf|dozhakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozhakïfthïfthïf|dozhakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfjïfjïf|dozhakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfshïfshïf|dozhakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfkïfkïf|dozhakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozhakïfthïf|dozhakïfthïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfjïf|dozhakïfjïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfshïf|dozhakïfshïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfkïf|dozhakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozhakïfthïf|dozhakïfthïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfjïf|dozhakïfjïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfshïf|dozhakïfshïf]] || [[word:dozhakïfkïf|dozhakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dozhakæthæ|dozhakæthæ]] || [[word:dozhakæjæ|dozhakæjæ]] || [[word:dozhakæshæ|dozhakæshæ]] || [[word:dozhakækæ|dozhakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dozhakathatha|dozhakathatha]] || [[word:dozhakajaja|dozhakajaja]] || [[word:dozhakashasha|dozhakashasha]] || [[word:dozhakakaka|dozhakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dozhakatha|dozhakatha]] || [[word:dozhakaja|dozhakaja]] || [[word:dozhakasha|dozhakasha]] || [[word:dozhakaka|dozhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dozhakafthaf|dozhakafthaf]] || [[word:dozhakafjaf|dozhakafjaf]] || [[word:dozhakafshaf|dozhakafshaf]] || [[word:dozhakafkaf|dozhakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dozhakasha|dozhakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozhakshësha|dozhakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozhakrosha|dozhakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozhakmusha|dozhakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozhakyasha|dozhakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozhaknkshësha|godozhaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozhaknkrosha|godozhaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozhaknkmusha|godozhaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozhaknkyasha|godozhaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dozhazhakasha|dozhazhakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozhazhakshësha|dozhazhakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozhazhakrosha|dozhazhakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozhazhakmusha|dozhazhakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozhazhakyasha|dozhazhakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozhazhaknkshësha|godozhazhaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozhazhaknkrosha|godozhazhaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozhazhaknkmusha|godozhazhaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozhazhaknkyasha|godozhazhaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dezhækasha|dezhækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dezhækshësha|dezhækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dezhækrosha|dezhækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dezhækmusha|dezhækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dezhækyasha|dezhækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godezhæknkshësha|godezhæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godezhæknkrosha|godezhæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godezhæknkmusha|godezhæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godezhæknkyasha|godezhæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dozhfakasha|dozhfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dozhfakshësha|dozhfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dozhfakrosha|dozhfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dozhfakmusha|dozhfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dozhfakyasha|dozhfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godozhfaknkshësha|godozhfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godozhfaknkrosha|godozhfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godozhfaknkmusha|godozhfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godozhfaknkyasha|godozhfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
